---
title: "Biomolecules"
---

[![Tyrosine is an amino acid used in the synthesis of adrenaline and dopamine, neurotransmitters in the human body that act as an antidepressant.](tirosina.png){width="40%"}](https://chemapps.stolaf.edu/jmol/jmol.php?model=C1=CC(=CC=C1C%5BC@@H%5D(C(=O)O)N)O)

<p style="text-align:right;">
[Wikipedia](https://pt.wikipedia.org/wiki/Tyrosine)
</p>

[![Glucose is used by cells as an energy source and an intermediary metabolic.](glicose.png){width="40%"}](https://chemapps.stolaf.edu/jmol/jmol.php?model=C(%5BC@@H%5D1%5BC@H%5D(%5BC@@H%5D(%5BC@H%5D(C(O1)O)O)O)O)O)

<p style="text-align:right;">
[Wikipedia](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Glucose)
</p>

[![Lecithin is used commercially both as an emulsifier and as a lubricant in various economic activities, such as in the pharmaceutical industry or food.](lecitina.png){width="40%"}](https://chemapps.stolaf.edu/jmol/jmol.php?model=%20CCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCC(=O)OC%5BC@H%5D(COP(=O)(%5BO-%5D)OCC%5BN+%5D(C)(C)C)OC(=O)CCCCCCCC/C=C\C/C=C\CCCCC)

<p style="text-align:right;">
[Wikipedia](https://pt.wikipedia.org/wiki/Lecithin)
</p>

[![Insulin is a hormone responsible for reducing blood glucose levels by promoting the entry of glucose into cells.](insulina.png){width="40%"}](https://chemapps.stolaf.edu/jmol/jmol.php?)

<p style="text-align:right;">
[Wikipedia](https://pt.wikipedia.org/wiki/Insulina)
</p>
